subprocess_isolation.warning: claude binary not on PATH; running in same-session degraded mode. Pipeline kernel hooks and forgery defenses still apply.

budget_cap.warning: no known native budget cap on Codex CLI; consider EVOLVE_RUN_TIMEOUT

profile_permissions.warning: Codex CLI profile-permission support unconfirmed; assume none and rely on pipeline-level hooks

notes: v8.51.0 introduces Codex as tier-1 hybrid. Mirrors Gemini's pattern: when claude binary is available, delegate to claude.sh for full isolation; otherwise run in same-session degraded mode. Native Codex execution (no claude) deferred to v8.54.0 pending CLI-side primitives.
